name: pi-spawner
description: Delegate coding-agent subtasks to read-by-default Pi CLI model workers with configurable permission, provider, model, thinking level, aliases, and routes.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate work to Pi model workers
interface.longDescription: Pi Spawner lets Codex orchestrate read-by-default Pi CLI workers with per-task permission, provider, model, thinking level, aliases, and route-based defaults for code, review, writing, design, and planning.
defaultPrompt: Use Pi workers to compare model opinions
Ask Kimi and DeepSeek to review this
Delegate design, writing, and code tasks
